features.title: Everything you need, elegantly done

hosts.title: Meet Your Hosts
hosts.body: We are Wafaa & Alex, a German-Egyptian couple who warmly welcome guests from around the world. Together we created Sunny Stays Hurghada to combine authentic Egyptian hospitality with the comfort and quality we value ourselves. We are always happy to share local recommendations and help make your stay in Hurghada relaxing, memorable and truly feel like home.

why.title: Small details, big difference
why.recs_body: Curated tips for restaurants, snorkelling spots and quiet beaches from people who live here.
why.response_body: We usually reply within the hour — before, during and after your stay.
why.comfort_body: Fresh linens, quiet air conditioning, fast Wi-Fi and a fully equipped kitchen.
why.location_body: Minutes from Sheraton Road, the marina, beaches, cafés and grocery stores.

pricing.note: Current prices available on Airbnb — rates vary by season.

review.title: Your hosts
review.quote: "Together with my German husband, we've created a cozy home where you'll feel welcome from the very first moment. We love sharing personal tips for Hurghada."
review.author: — Wafaa, Host
